recommendations.title: The Great Ziegfeld

recommendations.title: Memento
recommendations.overview: Leonard Shelby is tracking down the man who raped and murdered his wife. The difficulty of locating his wife's killer, however, is compounded by the fact that he suffers from a rare, untreatable form of short-term memory loss. Although he can recall

recommendations.title: Bride & Prejudice
recommendations.overview: Mrs. Bakshi is eager to find suitors for her four unmarried daughters when a family friend introduces them to handsome American Will Darcy. A Bollywood-style modern adaptation of Jane Austen's classic novel.

recommendations.title: For the Love of Spock
recommendations.overview: The life of Mr. Spock, as well as that of Leonard Nimoy, the actor who played him for almost fifty years, written and directed by his son: Adam.

recommendations.title: Shotgun Wedding
recommendations.overview: Darcy and Tom gather their families for the ultimate destination wedding but when the entire party is taken hostage, “’Til Death Do Us Part” takes on a whole new meaning. Now, Darcy and Tom must save their loved ones—if they don’t kill each other fir

recommendations.title: Pride and Prejudice and Zombies
recommendations.overview: A zombie outbreak has fallen upon the land in this reimagining of Jane Austen's classic tale of the tangled relationships between lovers from different social classes in 19th century England. Feisty heroine Elizabeth Bennet is a master of martial art

recommendations.title: A Good Marriage
recommendations.overview: After 25 years of a good marriage, what will Darcy do once she discovers her husband's sinister secret?

recommendations.title: Mothering Sunday
recommendations.overview: On a warm spring day in 1924, house maid and foundling Jane Fairchild finds herself alone on Mother's Day. Her employers, Mr. and Mrs. Niven, are out and she has the rare chance to spend quality time with her secret lover. Paul is the boy from the ma

recommendations.title: Roald Dahl's Esio Trot
recommendations.overview: Retired bachelor Mr Hoppy is hopelessly in love with his neighbour Mrs Silver, but she is only interested in her pet tortoise Alfie - until Mr Hoppy hatches an audacious plan.

recommendations.title: This Sporting Life
recommendations.overview: In Northern England in the early 1960s, Frank Machin is mean, tough and ambitious enough to become an immediate star in the rugby league team run by local employer Weaver.
